commands.review_summary:
Adds Android parsing, runtime state, refresh/resolve wiring, Approvals UI cards/counts, and parser tests for Gateway exec approvals.

PR surface: Other +651. Total +651 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level. Current main's Android Approvals screen only renders chat pending tool calls while the Gateway already exposes scoped exec approval list/get/resolve methods and Android connects with `operator.approvals`; I did not run a live emulator repro in this read-only pass.

target.title: fix: route Android exec approvals to in-app inbox
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Android had stable gateway operator identity and approval scopes, but the in-app Approvals surface still only reflected active chat pending tool calls. Exec approval requests routed through the gateway were not listed, refreshed, resolved, or handled from connected Android clients, so mobile-originated exec approval flows did not have an Android inbox equivalent to iOS.

## Why This Change Was Made

This keeps the canonical approval surface inside the app instead of depending on notification permission, background delivery, FCM, or local notifications. Android now loads gateway-backed exec approvals on connect/resume/open/manual refresh, handles live requested/resolved gateway events while connected, hydrates details before exposing actionable decisions, and resolves decisions through `exec.approval.resolve`.

The packet intentionally avoids adding Android remote push/FCM. Notifications can be attention routing later, but approval review remains available through the in-app Approvals screen while connected.

## User Impact

Android users get a gateway-backed Approvals inbox with manual refresh and explicit Gateway Pending / Session Activity counts. Existing chat pending tool-call indicators remain visible instead of being replaced.

When there are no gateway approvals, Android now says the inbox is available and will show exec approval requests while the phone is connected.

## Evidence

Visual artifacts generated locally from emulator `emulator-5554`. The before capture was taken after installing exact `origin/main` at `b50a5aebba`; the after capture was taken after reinstalling this branch.

- Before still: `.artifacts/android-exec-approval-parity/before-approvals.png`
- After still: `.artifacts/android-exec-approval-parity/after-approvals.png`
- Before/after contact sheet: `.artifacts/android-exec-approval-parity/before-after-approvals.png`
- Before/after GIF: `.artifacts/android-exec-approval-parity/before-after-approvals.gif`
- Current app flow GIF: `.artifacts/android-exec-approval-parity/approvals-flow.gif`
- Current app flow MP4: `.artifacts/android-exec-approval-parity/approvals-flow.mp4`
- Exact origin/main still: `.artifacts/android-exec-approval-parity/before-approvals-origin-main.png`
- Exact current-branch still: `.artifacts/android-exec-approval-parity/after-approvals-current.png`

```bash
JAVA_HOME="/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home" \
ANDROID_HOME="$HOME/Library/Android/sdk" \
ANDROID_SDK_ROOT="$HOME/Library/Android/sdk" \
./gradlew :app:testPlayDebugUnitTest :app:testThirdPartyDebugUnitTest :app:assemblePlayDebug :app:assembleThirdPartyDebug
```

Result: `BUILD SUCCESSFUL in 1m 2s`.

```bash
JAVA_HOME="/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home" \
ANDROID_HOME="$HOME/Library/Android/sdk" \
ANDROID_SDK_ROOT="$HOME/Library/Android/sdk" \
./gradlew :app:installPlayDebug
```

Result: `BUILD SUCCESSFUL in 3s`; installed `openclaw-2026.6.9-play-debug.apk` on `OpenClaw_FinalProof_API_36`.

```bash
git diff --check
```

Result: pass.

```bash

```

- `apps/android/app/src/main/java/ai/openclaw/app/chat/ChatController.kt`
- `apps/android/app/src/main/java/ai/openclaw/app/ui/chat/ChatScreen.kt`

```bash

./gradlew :app:lintThirdPartyDebug
```

Result: blocked by pre-existing Android lint errors in untouched files, first failures:

- `apps/android/app/src/play/AndroidManifest.xml:13` `READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE` / `ScopedStorage`
- `apps/android/app/src/main/java/ai/openclaw/app/ui/OnboardingFlow.kt:1381` `POST_NOTIFICATIONS` / `InlinedApi`

Autoreview:

```bash
.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --prompt "Review the Android exec approval parity patch after clearing resolved tombstones on disconnect/reconnect and after preserving gateway-backed approval UI behavior. Focus on correctness, stale async refresh/event races, resolver state, and regressions in existing chat pending tool-call indicators."
```

Result: clean; no accepted/actionable findings reported.
